description: Lines 340-405 define a private State class that mixes data properties with business logic (timeout calculation methods like outer_timeout_seconds, sleep_timeout_seconds, stuck_threshold_seconds). Extract State into its own file (e.g. src/fetcher/refresh_state.cr) and consider moving the timeout calculation logic into a separate RefreshTiming helper or Config extension, since these are derived values that don't belong in a state holder.
title: Extract RefreshLoop::State class and timeout calculations
